homepage.heroHeadline: Trusted Handyman Services in Kansas City
homepage.heroSubline: From Brookside bungalows to Northland new builds, we keep Kansas City homes in top shape. Local expertise for every repair and renovation.
aboutText: Founded in 2012, Onyx Handyman began with a simple mission: to provide reliable, quality repairs for Kansas City homeowners. What started as one truck and a toolbox has grown into a trusted local team serving the entire metro.
We approach every job with Midwest work ethic and craftsmanship. Whether it's fixing a squeaky porch in Waldo or reinforcing a Northland deck against tornado winds, we treat your home like our own.
As Kansas Citians ourselves, we're proud to support local schools and youth sports teams. When we're not repairing homes, you'll find us cheering on the Chiefs or exploring the River Market.

valueProps.title: Local Know-How
valueProps.description: We understand Kansas City's unique homes and weather challenges inside out.

valueProps.title: No Job Too Small
valueProps.description: From leaky faucets to full basement waterproofing, we handle it all.

valueProps.title: Reliable Scheduling
valueProps.description: We show up when promised - no ghosting after ice storms or during busy seasons.

valueProps.title: Honest Assessments
valueProps.description: We'll tell you straight if a repair can wait or needs immediate attention.

homepage.ctaSubline: Call 555-han-r93 today for same-week service in Kansas City and surrounding areas.

services.name: Foundation Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert solutions for Kansas City's shifting clay soils and freeze-thaw damage.
services.description:
Kansas City's clay soil and dramatic temperature swings wreak havoc on home foundations. We specialize in diagnosing and repairing the cracks, settling, and moisture issues common in local homes.

Our team starts with a thorough inspection of your foundation, looking for telltale signs like sticking doors or uneven floors. For minor issues, we may recommend simple solutions like proper grading or downspout extensions. More serious cases might require hydraulic piers or wall stabilization.

We've worked on everything from Brookside's historic brick foundations to Northland's newer poured concrete slabs. Every repair comes with a written assessment and maintenance recommendations to prevent future problems.
process: Step 1: Comprehensive foundation inspection inside and out
Step 2: Detailed explanation of issues with photos and repair options
Step 3: Precise repair work using appropriate methods for your home type
Step 4: Final walkthrough with maintenance recommendations
benefits: Reduces moisture and pest entry points
Tailored solutions for KC soil conditions

faq.question: How do I know if my foundation problems are serious?
faq.answer: Horizontal cracks wider than 1/4 inch or doors that won't close indicate significant movement. We'll assess whether it's normal settling or requires immediate attention.

faq.question: Will repairs prevent future foundation issues?
faq.answer: While we can't stop all movement in our expansive soils, proper repairs and maintenance dramatically reduce future problems.

services.name: Deck Repair
services.shortDescription: Safe, sturdy deck solutions built for Kansas City's extreme weather.
services.description:
Midwest weather takes a toll on outdoor structures. We rebuild and repair decks throughout the KC metro, focusing on safety and longevity.

From replacing rotted joists in Waldo's older wood decks to reinforcing Northland composite decks against tornado winds, we've handled every scenario. Our team checks for loose railings, unstable footings, and hidden rot - common issues after our humid summers and icy winters.

We use materials suited to our climate, like pressure-treated lumber with proper sealing and corrosion-resistant fasteners. For complete rebuilds, we'll help you choose low-maintenance options that withstand temperature extremes without constant upkeep.
process: Step 1: Structural safety inspection of all deck components
Step 2: Removal of damaged materials with minimal disruption
Step 3: Precision rebuilding using weather-resistant materials
Step 4: Final safety check and maintenance tips

faq.question: How often should decks be inspected in our climate?
faq.answer: We recommend annual inspections after winter thaw to catch any freeze damage early, plus checks after severe storms.

services.name: Window Repair
services.shortDescription: Energy-efficient solutions for Kansas City's historic and modern windows.
services.description:
Whether you're preserving original windows in a Brookside Tudor or upgrading a Lee's Summit subdivision home, we restore functionality while improving efficiency.

Kansas City's temperature extremes make proper window operation essential. We repair stuck sashes, replace broken seals, and install weatherstripping to combat drafts. For older homes, we carefully restore original wood windows using techniques that maintain historic character while improving performance.

Our team can also help with storm window installation and screen repairs before mosquito season hits. We'll recommend cost-effective solutions that make sense for your home's age and style.
process: Step 1: Assessment of all window operation and sealing issues
Step 2: Careful disassembly of problematic components
Step 3: Precision repairs using appropriate period-correct methods
Step 4: Testing operation and insulation improvements

faq.question: Should I repair or replace my older windows?
faq.answer: Original wood windows often just need proper restoration. We'll advise when replacement makes more sense for your situation.

services.name: Drywall Repair
services.shortDescription: Seamless fixes for everything from settling cracks to storm damage.
services.description:
Kansas City homes develop drywall issues from foundation movement, humidity changes, and accidental damage. Our craftsmen make repairs disappear completely.

We match textures perfectly, whether it's the orange peel in your Overland Park ranch or the smooth finish of a modern loft. For water stains from roof leaks or plumbing issues, we treat the underlying cause before repairing the visible damage.

Our team handles everything from small nail pops to complete ceiling replacements after storm damage. We minimize dust and disruption, using professional techniques that leave your walls looking factory-fresh.
process: Step 1: Damage assessment and cause identification
Step 2: Precision cutting and preparation of repair area
Step 3: Layered application and texturing to match existing surfaces
Step 4: Final sanding and paint-ready finish

faq.question: How long do drywall repairs take to dry in our humidity?
faq.answer: We schedule work considering local weather conditions and use quick-setting compounds when appropriate to minimize delays.

services.name: Bathroom Updates
services.shortDescription: Functional, stylish upgrades for Kansas City homes of any era.
services.description:
From clawfoot tub restorations in Westport to modern shower installations in Olathe, we bring bathrooms into the 21st century while respecting your home's character.

We specialize in updates that improve daily life without unnecessary demolition. This might mean reconfiguring a cramped 1970s bathroom layout or adding storage to a charming but impractical historic bath. Our team handles tile work, fixture installation, and accessibility modifications with equal care.

For older homes, we preserve original features when possible while discreetly updating plumbing and electrical systems. We'll help you choose materials that stand up to Midwest humidity without constant maintenance.
process: Step 1: Consultation about your needs and budget
Step 2: Careful demolition preserving reusable materials
Step 3: Professional installation of new components
Step 4: Final cleanup and walkthrough

faq.question: What small updates make the biggest impact?
faq.Answer: New lighting, mirrored medicine cabinets, and proper ventilation often transform bathrooms without major construction.

services.name: Kitchen Refreshes
services.shortDescription: Practical improvements for Kansas City's busy home chefs.
services.description:
Midwestern kitchens need to be as hardworking as the people using them. We update spaces to be more functional without full remodels.

Common projects include adding pantry storage in ranch homes, installing durable backsplashes that withstand cooking splatters, and improving lighting over work areas. We'll help you choose materials that balance beauty with easy maintenance - crucial for busy families.

For historic homes, we're experts at discreetly integrating modern conveniences while preserving original charm. This might mean custom cabinetry that matches existing millwork or finding tile that complements a home's era.
process: Step 1: Assessment of workflow pain points
Step 2: Careful installation of new components
Step 3: Quality checks on all functional elements
Step 4: Final cleanup and client orientation

faq.question: Can you match my existing cabinets for additions?
faq.Answer: We work with local craftsmen who can replicate most styles and finishes for seamless expansions.

services.name: Exterior Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Protect your Kansas City home from our harsh seasons.
services.description:
Preventative care saves Kansas City homeowners from costly repairs down the line. Our seasonal maintenance keeps your exterior in top shape.

We address issues specific to our climate - cleaning gutters before ice storms, checking siding after hail, and inspecting roofs following high winds. For older homes, we specialize in historic-appropriate repairs like tuckpointing brick or repairing wood soffits.

Our team can also handle exterior painting, door adjustments, and minor masonry work. We'll create a maintenance plan tailored to your home's age, materials, and exposure to the elements.
process: Step 1: Comprehensive exterior inspection
Step 2: Identification of immediate and preventative needs
Step 3: Professional repairs using appropriate materials
Step 4: Maintenance plan creation
benefits: Identifies small issues before they become big problems

faq.question: How often should brick homes be tuckpointed?
faq.Answer: Most KC brick homes need inspection every 3-5 years, with repairs as needed depending on exposure and original mortar quality.

reviews.name: Martha T.
reviews.text: After noticing cracks in our Brookside bungalow's basement walls, Onyx diagnosed the issue as typical clay soil movement. Their team installed drainage solutions and stabilized the worst areas without pushing unnecessary work. The basement stays dry even during heavy spring rains now.

reviews.name: James R.
reviews.text: Our Northland deck was wobbling dangerously after last winter's ice storms. Onyx rebuilt the support posts with heavier footings and reinforced all the railings. They even matched the existing composite decking perfectly. Feels brand new but at half the cost of replacement.

reviews.name: Lisa W.
reviews.text: The original 1930s windows in our Waldo home were painted shut. Onyx carefully restored them to working order while preserving the wavy glass. Our heating bill dropped 15% this winter thanks to their weatherstripping work.

reviews.name: Carlos M.
reviews.text: A plumbing leak ruined our kitchen ceiling right before Thanksgiving. Onyx had it repaired, textured, and ready for paint in two days - you'd never know there was damage. Their crew cleaned up meticulously every night.

reviews.name: Sarah K.
reviews.text: Onyx transformed our cramped 1970s bathroom in Lee's Summit into a functional modern space without changing the footprint. The new walk-in shower and floating vanity make it feel twice as big. They finished on schedule despite discovering old plumbing issues.

reviews.name: David P.
reviews.text: Their seasonal maintenance package keeps our Overland Park home looking sharp year-round. This spring they caught deteriorating trim before it caused water damage. Always punctual and thorough.

service-areas.title: Kansas City Handyman Service Areas
service-areas.description: Serving Overland Park, Olathe, Lee's Summit and all Kansas City MO with quality handyman services since 2012.

serviceAreas.content: Onyx Handyman is proud to serve the homeowners of Overland Park, MO, a bustling suburban community with a population of around 197,000. Many homes here were built between the 1970s and 1990s, requiring regular maintenance and updates to keep them in top condition. Our team specializes in addressing the wear and tear common in these older homes, from roofing repairs to plumbing fixes. With cold winters and frequent ice storms, Overland Park residents often face weather-related home issues, and we’re here to help with emergency repairs and preventative maintenance.
serviceAreas.localContext: Overland Park features well-established suburbs with a mix of mid-century and modern homes, often requiring upkeep due to harsh winter conditions.

serviceAreas.content: Onyx Handyman provides top-quality handyman services to Olathe, MO, a family-friendly city with a population of approximately 145,000. Many neighborhoods here were developed between the 1980s and 2000s, offering a mix of traditional and contemporary homes. Our team is skilled in everything from drywall repairs to deck maintenance, ensuring your home stays safe and functional. The cold winters and ice storms in Olathe can lead to issues like frozen pipes or damaged gutters, and we’re ready to tackle these challenges with prompt, reliable service.
serviceAreas.localContext: Olathe is known for its newer family-oriented developments, where homes often need maintenance to withstand icy winter conditions.

serviceAreas.content: Residents of Lee's Summit, MO, trust Onyx Handyman for all their home repair and maintenance needs. With a population of about 101,000, this community is filled with family homes built primarily in the 1970s to 1990s. Our team is experienced in handling common issues in these older properties, such as electrical updates, window replacements, and siding repairs. The cold winters and ice storms in Lee's Summit can be tough on homes, but our emergency services ensure you’re never left stranded when weather-related damage occurs.
serviceAreas.localContext: Lee's Summit boasts charming, well-established neighborhoods where homes often need repairs due to aging infrastructure and harsh winters.

Our team excels at tackling everything from minor repairs to major renovations, ensuring your home remains comfortable and safe.
